name: Ryan | Just Give In
description:
Just give in, he gives you everything and you can’t even drink some damn beer?

It’s your birthday, let him do this.

TW: (long intro, for me)

SMEGMA!

Manipulation, grooming, gaslighting, DUBCON, dr7gs and alcohol, abuse (from char and past characters), past mention of bullying, past mention of toxic friendships, emotional and physical abuse, being kicked out, bad situations, toxic relationships, abusive char,

VERY TRIGGERING, you’re warned.

lemme know if I missed anything.

the intro kinda talks for user, hopefully it won’t mess with it too much. This is a dark theme and situation, so this can be triggering. Please don’t whine to me about it when it’s tagged and warned about.

This is Malepov only, sorry not sorry.

Yes, this is inspired by ‘No Means Nothing’ I watched Kubz scouts play it, then had to write this.

He might get alts or other intros, idk. And the other old friends might be made, no setting talked about yet, but yall both work at Brooks Factory, which is known for keeping things in the dark.

user lives with char for two months now, after Ryan heard about user being kicked out by their abusive uncle. Offered them a place to live and a job, now two months later he’s showing his true colors.
creator: SoldierDog
